query:
SELECT 'bookings' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM bookings
UNION ALL SELECT 'schedule_slots', COUNT(*) FROM schedule_slots
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'payments', COUNT(*) FROM payments WHERE 1=1
